‹ GalNet Chronicle
Entity Profile
P

Sofia Trevino

Person · First seen 3307-07-21 · 12 mentions
Active: 3307-07-21 → 3311-01-09
Mentions Timeline (12 articles)
3311-01-09
Empire Accused of Power Grab in Federation's Heart
Imperial agents were accused of expanding influence in Federal territory following the Battle of Sol, particularly in Sol and Barnard's Star, with Princess Aisling Duval's humanitarian reputation driving unexpected Imperial sentiment.
3310-08-29
Jerome Archer and Nakato Kaine Increase Supporters
As Zachary Hudson prepares to leave office, Federal groups shift allegiance to Jerome Archer as shadow president, while Nakato Kaine gains Alliance support opposing Edmund Mahon's Sirius partnership.
3310-02-13
Catastrophic Earthquakes Strike Rhea 3
Catastrophic earthquakes strike Rhea 3, devastating the capital New Greenacre and causing millions of casualties. President-elect Felicia Winters cancels her schedule to aid her homeworld.
3310-01-22
Winters Appoints Future Cabinet Members
President-elect Felicia Winters announces her cabinet appointments, including Bai Zheng as Secretary for Security to oversee PDB closure, and sets mid-February for her inauguration.
3309-10-12
Sol Celebrations End as Election Begins
Federal voting begins after Sol celebrations conclude, with profiles of both candidates and their running mates.
3309-06-12
Far God Deportation Programme Approved
President Hudson agrees to deport Far God cultists to the Alliance, framing it as pragmatic cost-cutting while the Dedicant is prepared for transport.
3309-05-22
Presidential Campaigns Target Federal Voters
The three presidential candidates ramp up campaigns for the delayed August election, with media coverage focusing on character over policy and the war casting a shadow over voter optimism.
3309-05-01
Rackham Fundraiser Secures Political Backing
Zachary Rackham holds a lavish fundraiser revealing Anya Blackriver as campaign manager, celebrity endorsements, and Congressman Harlan Turk as running mate.
3308-10-14
Congressional Candidate Endorses Xeno-Peace Movement
Dalton Chase, the Federal governor of Andavandul 1, is campaigning to become a member of Congress with support from the Thargoid Advocacy Project.
3307-11-03
Demands for Federal Rebellion Decline
Recent polls suggest the likelihood of further Federal secessions is waning, partly due to the Proactive Detection Bureau's role in preventing Jupiter's Wrath terrorist attacks.
3307-09-13
Rebellion Spreads Through the Federation
Seven additional Federal factions sever ties with the superpower over the Proactive Detection Bureau, bringing the total number of seceded factions to fifteen.
3307-07-21
Federation Threatened by Further Secession
Federal Times journalist Sofia Trevino reports that dozens of factions are considering independence following Azaladshu's success. The seceded systems have severed PDB links. Advocacy claims the FIA is arresting secessionist leaders on spurious charges. Both Hudson and Winters contact system leaders to prevent further secession.
